description: Skill activation triggers for Claude Code. Controls when skills automatically suggest or block actions. Add C++/CMake/MapleStory-DLL skills here as they are authored.

enforcement_types.suggest: Skill suggestion appears but doesn't block execution
enforcement_types.block: Requires skill to be used before proceeding (guardrail)

priority_levels.low: Optional - Trigger only for explicit matches

customization.pathPatterns: Adjust to match project structure (bypass/, redirect/, common/, include/, etc.)
customization.keywords: Add domain-specific terms (DLL, hook, IAT, MapleStory, ijl15, memory map, etc.)
customization.intentPatterns: Use regex for flexible user intent matching
